title: Accel-Amplicon® Plus EGFR Pathway Panel

block (98) and thermocycler lid (
Input your protocol parameters (specify the number of initial DNA samples 1-24).
Upload your protocol into the OT App. Be sure to use OT App settings in advance of the protocol run to pre-cool the temperature and thermocycler modules to 4 degrees.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
Deck lights will momentarily go off to indicate a pause when reagents should be added to the OT-2 deck:
